metadata.description: Food items and edible substances for community nourishment
metadata.cultural_focus: Food items that embody cooperative values through community sharing, traditional preparation methods, and sustainable food relationships

concepts.concept_description: traditional grain variety preserved through community seed saving
concepts.cultural_meaning: values genetic diversity and community knowledge over industrial uniformity, connecting present food security with ancestral wisdom

concepts.concept_description: vegetables preserved through traditional fermentation for winter storage
concepts.cultural_meaning: honors beneficial microorganisms as partners in food preservation, creating nutrition and flavor through natural processes

concepts.concept_description: small fruits gathered from natural landscapes for seasonal nutrition
concepts.cultural_meaning: values traditional foraging knowledge over agricultural dependence, connecting community with natural abundance through seasonal gathering

concepts.concept_description: animal protein preserved through traditional drying methods for long-term storage
concepts.cultural_meaning: honors traditional preservation techniques that extend hunting success throughout seasons, supporting community protein needs sustainably

concepts.concept_description: healing plants gathered and prepared for treating illness and maintaining health
concepts.cultural_meaning: treats food as medicine through traditional plant knowledge, integrating nutrition and healing rather than separating food and medicine
